name: Scallops and Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown bacon in a skillet until crispy. Drain on paper towels and set aside, saving 1 tablespoon of fat in the skillet.
2. Add onion to the skillet and cook for about 3 minutes, or until it becomes translucent.
3. Add scallops to the skillet and cook until they turn white, about 3 minutes. Remove and keep warm.
4. Add mushrooms, snow peas, and sherry to the skillet. Cover and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch and water to make a slurry. Stir this mixture into the skillet until it thickens.
6. Add back the reserved bacon and scallops to the skillet. Stir in lemon juice and salt.
7. Heat the dish through just before serving, then serve over rice.
